channel.title: Jason David Newton – Blog
channel.description: Personal reflections on faith, fatherhood, leadership, hard work, and life in Moses Lake, Washington by Jason David Newton. Mechanical technician at Group 14 Technologies, Christian dad at Grace Harvest Church, Pacific Northwest adventures.

item.title: Five Things Three Years at Sea Taught Me That No Job on Land Ever Could
item.description: From self-reliance to gratitude, three years aboard the C/P Starbound in the Bering Sea taught me things that no job on land ever could. Lessons I still carry every day in Moses Lake.

item.title: What I Want My Son to Know Before He's Old Enough to Not Listen to Me
item.description: Your word is everything, learn how things work, keep Jesus at the center. What I'm trying to pass down to my son in Moses Lake, not as lectures, but as a life lived out in front of him.

item.title: The Pacific Northwest Has a Way of Putting Things in Perspective
item.description: Getting outside in the Pacific Northwest isn't just stress relief. It's become something close to a spiritual practice. Why I make it a point to hit the trails around Moses Lake every week.

item.title: What It's Actually Like Being a Blue-Collar Guy at a Tech Company
item.description: The tech world gets plenty of press about the flashy side. Here's what it actually looks like being the hands-on guy at a cutting-edge company in Moses Lake, Washington.

item.title: Why I'd Choose Moses Lake Over Any Big City, Every Single Time
item.description: People ask me why I stay in Moses Lake. Here's the honest answer. Small town life, community, family, and meaningful work. I'd choose it over any big city every time.

item.title: Faith and Staying Grounded in Moses Lake: How Jesus Keeps Me Steady as a Christian Dad
item.description: How faith in Jesus at Grace Harvest Church keeps me steady as a Christian dad and mechanical technician amid work, family, and life's daily pull in Moses Lake, Washington.

item.title: Why Hard Work Still Matters in Moses Lake: A Mechanical Technician's Honest Take
item.description: Showing up every day in Moses Lake still builds real character, trust, and opportunities. Honest reflections from a mechanical technician who believes the grind is the teacher.

item.title: Being a Christian Dad in Moses Lake: Balancing Faith, Family, and a Mechanical Tech Life
item.description: Real talk on balancing faith, family, and work as a mechanical technician in Moses Lake, Washington. Reflections on fatherhood, Grace Harvest Church, and staying grounded.

item.title: 7 Simple Bible Study Habits That Actually Work for Busy Christian Dads in Moses Lake
item.description: Practical, realistic Bible study habits for busy Christian dads. How to stay in the Word despite work, family, and life in Moses Lake, WA.
